channel.title: BoxBoxF1Fantasy updates
channel.description: Latest F1 Fantasy predictions, race picks, tools and guides from BoxBoxF1Fantasy.

item.title: F1 Fantasy Picks: Belgian GP 2026
item.description: Race-week F1 Fantasy picks, projected points, value picks and constructor choices for Belgian Grand Prix.

item.title: F1 Fantasy Picks: British GP 2026
item.description: Race-week F1 Fantasy picks, projected points, value picks and constructor choices for British Grand Prix.

item.description: Race-week F1 Fantasy picks, projected points, value picks and constructor choices for Austrian Grand Prix.

item.description: Race-week F1 Fantasy picks, projected points, value picks and constructor choices for Spanish Grand Prix.

item.title: F1 Fantasy Picks: Monaco GP 2026
item.description: Race-week F1 Fantasy picks, projected points, value picks and constructor choices for Monaco Grand Prix.

item.title: F1 Fantasy Picks: Canadian GP 2026
item.description: Race-week F1 Fantasy picks, projected points, value picks and constructor choices for Canadian Grand Prix.

item.title: F1 Fantasy Picks: Miami GP 2026
item.description: Race-week F1 Fantasy picks, projected points, value picks and constructor choices for Miami Grand Prix.

item.title: F1 Fantasy Picks: Japanese GP 2026
item.description: Race-week F1 Fantasy picks, projected points, value picks and constructor choices for Japanese Grand Prix.

item.title: F1 Fantasy Guides (2026)
item.description: Free F1 Fantasy 2026 guides: how scoring works, how to win, chips explained, drivers vs constructors, and a beginner's how-to-play walkthrough.

item.title: How F1 Fantasy Scoring Works (2026)
item.description: A clear breakdown of F1 Fantasy 2026 scoring: qualifying and race points, overtakes, fastest lap, Driver of the Day, DNF penalties, sprint scoring and how constructor points (pit stops + qualifying bonus) work.

item.title: How to Win F1 Fantasy: Strategy Guide (2026)
item.description: Six proven F1 Fantasy strategies for 2026: build on value (PPM), grow your budget early, plan transfers ahead, time your chips, use constructors, and captain reliable upside.

item.title: F1 Fantasy Chips Explained (2026)
item.description: All six F1 Fantasy 2026 chips explained — Limitless, 3x Boost, Wild Card, No Negative, Autopilot and Final Fix — with the best time to use each.

item.title: Drivers vs Constructors in F1 Fantasy
item.description: Is it better to spend on drivers or constructors in F1 Fantasy? How constructor scoring (both drivers + pit stops + qualifying bonus) compares to a premium driver's ceiling.

item.title: F1 Fantasy for Beginners: How to Play (2026)
item.description: New to F1 Fantasy? A simple 2026 beginner's guide: budget, picking your 5 drivers and 2 constructors, transfers, chips, deadlines and how scoring works.

item.title: Free F1 Fantasy Tools
item.description: Free F1 Fantasy tools: a lineup optimizer, transfer planner, budget builder and points projections, all powered by machine-learning predictions.

item.title: F1 Fantasy Predictions 2026
item.description: Free F1 Fantasy 2026 predictions for every race weekend: projected driver points, constructor points, confidence ranges, value ratings, race picks and optimizer tools.

item.title: Best F1 Fantasy Team 2026
item.description: Find the best F1 Fantasy team for the current race weekend with free driver and constructor projections, budget checks, chips, value ratings and a lineup optimizer.

item.title: F1 Fantasy Captain Picks 2026
item.description: Free F1 Fantasy captain and boost pick advice for 2026: compare projected driver points, downside risk, confidence ranges and 3x Boost candidates.

item.title: F1 Fantasy Lineup Optimizer (Free)
item.description: A free F1 Fantasy lineup optimizer that checks all 1.4 million legal 5-driver, 2-constructor teams within your budget and ranks the best lineups using ML predictions.

item.title: F1 Fantasy Team Compare & Score Calculator
item.description: Free F1 Fantasy team compare tool: enter up to three candidate teams and compare budget, projected points, confidence range, price movement and downside risk.

item.title: F1 Fantasy Transfer Planner & Advisor
item.description: Free F1 Fantasy transfer tools: find your best one or two swaps this week, or plan transfers and chips across 2-5 upcoming rounds with a multi-week planner.

item.title: F1 Fantasy Budget Builder
item.description: Free F1 Fantasy budget builder: find the picks most likely to rise in price so your team value compounds, leaving more to spend on stars later in the season.

item.title: F1 Fantasy Points Calculator & Predictions
item.description: Free F1 Fantasy points calculator: see projected fantasy points for every driver and constructor this round, with a full breakdown of qualifying, race, overtakes and bonuses.

item.title: About BoxBoxF1Fantasy
item.description: About BoxBoxF1Fantasy: a free, independent F1 Fantasy prediction site with driver and constructor projections, optimizer tools, race picks, accuracy tracking and contact details.

item.title: Privacy Policy
item.description: Privacy policy for BoxBoxF1Fantasy, covering analytics, cookies, local browser storage, advertising, external links and contact information.
